parameters.body: ={{ JSON.stringify({ revolving_util: $json.revolving_util, age: $json.age, late_30_59: $json.late_30_59, debt_ratio: $json.debt_ratio, monthly_income: $json.monthly_income, open_credit_lines: $json.open_credit_lines, late_90: $json.late_90, real_estate_loans: $json.real_estate_loans, late_60_89: $json.late_60_89, dependents: $json.dependents }) }}

parameters.responseBody:
={{ JSON.stringify({
  status: 'success',
  applicant_id: $('Parse & Build Report').first().json.applicant_id,
  timestamp: $('Parse & Build Report').first().json.timestamp,
  risk_assessment: {
    risk_level: $('Parse & Build Report').first().json.risk_level,
    risk_indicator: $('Parse & Build Report').first().json.risk_emoji,
    default_probability: $('Parse & Build Report').first().json.default_probability,
    default_probability_pct: $('Parse & Build Report').first().json.default_probability_pct,
    prediction: $('Parse & Build Report').first().json.prediction,
    recommendation: $('Parse & Build Report').first().json.recommendation
  },
  risk_factors: [
    $('Parse & Build Report').first().json.risk_factor_1,
    $('Parse & Build Report').first().json.risk_factor_2,
    $('Parse & Build Report').first().json.risk_factor_3
  ],
  report_saved: true,
  report_filename: $('Parse & Build Report').first().json.filename,
  logged: true
}) }}
